query:
SELECT 
  bucketId,
  bucketType,
  realm,
  planId,
  ROUND(dataQuotaMb / 1024, 2) AS quota_gb,
  ROUND(dataUsedMb / 1024, 2) AS used_gb,
  ROUND(overageDataMb / 1024, 2) AS overage_gb,
  isOverQuota,
  simCount,
  snapshotDate,
  lastSyncedAt,
  updatedAt
FROM vocus_buckets
WHERE bucketType LIKE '%STANDARD%' OR bucketId LIKE '%STANDARD%' OR planId LIKE '%STANDARD%'
ORDER BY updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
